title: 爆料：OpenAI总裁当庭认罪，承认无偿收购300亿，马斯克这次要赢了吗？

titleEn: Breaking: OpenAI president pleads guilty in court, confesses to acquiring 30 billion for free, is Musk about to win this time?
descriptionEn: Absolutely explosive! Just now, OpenAI president Brockman admitted in court: he invested $0 and holds $30 billion in shares of OpenAI's for-profit division (Musk donated $38 million and got $0). Even more shocking, both Brockman and Altman secretly hold personal shares in Cerebras. Gary Marcus bluntly said this is the closest Musk has ever come to winning.
